name: Hougaard: Die Liefling van Loftus
overview: Rugby legend, Springbok kicking king, Currie Cup winner, Super Rugby mascot - Derick Hougaard has been a household name in South Africa for years. And people always have a lot to say about him. But in the new kykNET documentary series, Hougaard: Liefling van Loftus, this former rugby player opens his heart to give his side of the story.

trailers.title: Amptelike voorskou – Hougaard: Liefling van Loftus | S1 | kykNET
